author: ivanontech
name: AutoResearch R3 — Batch Size Reduction + Value Embeddings
blurb: Non-record submission on 1x RTX 4090: 12L 1024d transformer with Value Embeddings (31.4M gated fusion params), 32768 BPE vocab, all long-range attention. Key insight: reducing TOTAL_BATCH from 2^19 to 2^16 yields 6.4x more gradient steps in the same 5-min budget, dramatically improving convergence. 31 automated experiments across 3 rounds of hyperparameter search via karpathy/autoresearch.
